sigma.title: Privilege Escalation via Named Pipe Impersonation

osquery.name: t1021_ssh_keys
osquery.query_text: SELECT uid, path, filename, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '%/.ssh/%' LIMIT 50;

osquery.name: t1021_net_conn
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, local_address, local_port, remote_address, remote_port, state FROM process_open_sockets WHERE remote_port IN (22, 135, 139, 445, 3389, 5985, 5986) AND state = 'ESTABLISHED' LIMIT 100;

sigma_matches.title: Privilege Escalation via Named Pipe Impersonation

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 2 inherited-from-parent run(s) [no direct sub-technique executions], 8/8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
